name: FHE-Agent universal environment
description: Build environment for FHE-Agent background runs across FHE-managed repos. Phase 0 ships a docs/governance baseline; Phase 1+ extends with Node/Next.js tooling.
install: test -f package.json && npm ci || echo 'no package.json — Phase 0'
notes: This file is read by the Cursor Background Agent runtime when configured. Phase 0 of FHE-EPMC is documentation/governance; the install/verify steps reflect that. Update for Phase 1+ once the Next.js app lands.
